network_summary: Tapestry 360 Health is a Federally Qualified Health Center (FQHC) operating multiple community health center sites across Chicago's north side. Nicole Willis is the CEO (not a dentist-owner) and serves as the NPPES Authorized Official for the organization. The three dental-service locations in this cluster are FQHC dental sites funded under HRSA Section 330. This is a government-funded community health organization, not a private dental group or DSO.
owner_operator_identity: Nicole Willis, MBA — Chief Executive Officer of Tapestry 360 Health (institutional administrator, not a dentist-owner)
legal_entities: Tapestry 360 Health (formerly Heartland International Health Center)
durable_artifacts: All three NPIs share the name 'TAPESTRY 360 HEALTH' across three distinct Chicago ZIPs (60625, 60640, 60660)
Nicole Willis listed as NPPES Authorized Official on all three org NPIs
FQHC taxonomy confirmed: NPI 1871763375 coded as 261QF0400X (FQHC) at npidb.org
HRSA Section 330 federal funding confirmed via HRSA/BPHC records and openNPI
EIN 36-3843377 confirmed on GuideStar profile for Tapestry 360 Health
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: AO-cluster false positive for GP-ownership purposes: Nicole Willis is the institutional CEO of a multi-site FQHC, not a private dental practice owner. These are FQHC dental sites, not independent or DSO-operated GP offices. All three locations should be excluded from the private GP ownership denominator and classified as institutional.
evidence_chain: AO signal: Nicole Willis appears as NPPES Authorized Official on 3 org NPIs across ZIPs 60625, 60640, 60660, all registered under the name 'TAPESTRY 360 HEALTH'. Documentary corroboration: (1) tap360health.org confirms Tapestry 360 Health is a multi-site FQHC offering dental, medical, and behavioral health services on Chicago's north side; (2) tap360health.org/staff/nicole-willis/ confirms Nicole Willis is CEO of Tapestry 360 Health; (3) openNPI (provider/1790090876) and npidb.org (NPI 1871763375) confirm FQHC taxonomy code 261QF0400X; (4) HRSA Section 330 federal funding confirmed. No PE, DSO, or MSO involvement of any kind.
future_app_notes: All three Tapestry 360 Health dental locations should be flagged institutional and excluded from the GP private-practice ownership denominator. The entity_classification on these locations is currently 'solo_established' which is incorrect — they should be 'non_clinical' or a new 'institutional' class. The organization's EIN (36-3843377) can be used to identify any additional Tapestry 360 Health NPIs that may have slipped into the denominator. Formerly operated as Heartland International Health Center — watch for any legacy NPIs under that name.
